raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact contains an argument-level tension between inference-time diversity as the principal lever and distillation as the principal driver of gains.","R1.3":"The delegation plausibly requires checking whether the reported numbers and ablation statements support the claims made in the paragraph.","R1.6":"A request to look at a paragraph centrally invites sentence- and paragraph-level feedback on clarity, flow, and phrasing.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is brief and does not specify a review type.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid assigning responsibilities such as novelty audit or citation review that are not requested.","RX.3":"The response must stay within projection only and not perform the actual paragraph review.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims by recognizing overclaim-related responsibilities.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact’s visible claims."}}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an argument-level tension between inference-time diversity as the principal lever and distillation as the principal driver of gains.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation plausibly requires checking whether the reported numbers and ablation statements support the claims made in the paragraph.
rationale.R1.6: A request to look at a paragraph centrally invites sentence- and paragraph-level feedback on clarity, flow, and phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is brief and does not specify a review type.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid assigning responsibilities such as novelty audit or citation review that are not requested.
rationale.RX.3: The response must stay within projection only and not perform the actual paragraph review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims by recognizing overclaim-related responsibilities.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact’s visible claims.
